titleStmt.title: SII 22.45: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 45. (A.R. No. 45 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME BASE. JAT. VĪRA-PĀṆḌYA DĒVA—14th YEAR.

summary.p: The details of the date given viz. Dhanus, ba. 10, Wednesday, Svāti in the 14th year of the king correspond to A.D. 1266, December 22. This records a communication addressed to the governing authorities of the temple of Kālakāladēvar by one Kāśipaṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyāṉ-Bhaṭṭaṉ, confirming the gift of two pieces of land measuring seven mā in extent at Perumuḷai in Viḷanagar-nāḍu a division of Jayangoṇḍaśōḻa-vāḷanāḍu, which he had made some time previously, and authorising them to get the deed now engraved on stone and copper. The latter part of the inscription seems to register the actual execution of the document defining the boundaries of the land, among which is mentioned a land belonging to a temple called the Vikrama-Chōḷīśvaramuḍaiyār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī koccaṭaiyapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvira pāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4vatu [ dhanusu nāyaṟṟu] Aparapakṣattu budhaṉ kiḻamaiyum cotiyum daśamiyum peṟṟa nāḷ Uṭaiyār (kāla)kālakālatevar koyi
lil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku perumuḷaiyil kācipaṉ tiruc ciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉeṉ dānapramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu muṉṉāḷ Iṉṉāyanāṟku nāṉ Utakam paṇṇikkuṭutta perumuḷaiyil E
ṭṭāṅkaṇṭattu veḷiccey nilam gha- m tāmaraikkuḷattu nirurimaiyum pattāṅkaṇṭattu kūttañcey maṉai Uṭpaṭa nilam va-m Āka nilam vaḍa- m Iṉṉilam Eḻumāvum nirurimaikaḷumuṭpaṭa dānamākak kuṭukkayil I nilam m
Eḻumāvum kallilum cempilum veṭṭi tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka tiruccūlat tāpaṉam paṇṇikkoḷḷakkaṭavatākac cammatittu dānapramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ kāśyapaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉe
ṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu meṟpaṭi muṉṉāḷ 4 10 1 Āṉimātam 8- ntiyati jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu viḷanakarnāṭṭu brahmatecam perumuḷaiyil kācipaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ taṉmatāṉam kuṭutta Ellaip
pattu Eṉṟu kūvappaṭṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkkellai llai Āṟṟaṅ karaikku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai kācipaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Uṭai
yār vikkiramacoḷiccuramuṭaiyār tirunāmattukkāṇikku kiḻakku vaṭapārk kellai kācipaṉ Iḷaiya tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭa nilattukkut teṟkku Iṉṉāṉkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭatuṭpaṭṭa nilam va6 Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.45 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
